title: karakeep-app/karakeep
friendlyTitle: A self-hosted app for saving and organizing web content
summary: Karakeep is a self-hostable bookmark-everything app for links, notes, images, PDFs, and more, with full-text search, archival, LLM-based tagging and summarization, OCR, browser extensions, mobile apps, and agentic integrations.
friendlySummary: Karakeep saves links, notes, images, and PDFs, then can use AI to tag and summarize them.
whyItMatters: People who save lots of web material can use it as a private knowledge base with AI-assisted organization instead of relying on a cloud read-it-later service. Builders can study it as an example of AI features embedded in a practical personal information workflow.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help people keep track of useful information and find it later without depending only on someone else’s cloud service.
howItsUseful: People who save lots of web material can use it as a private knowledge base with AI-assisted organization instead of relying on a cloud read-it-later service. Builders can study it as an example of AI features embedded in a practical personal information workflow.
friendlyHowItsUseful: It can help people keep track of useful information and find it later without depending only on someone else’s cloud service.
